scheme_name: HDFC Silver ETF FoF Direct Growth
exit_load: Exit load of 1% if redeemed within 15 days.
about_fund:
About HDFC Silver ETF FoF Direct Growth HDFC Silver ETF FoF Direct Growth is a Commodities Mutual Fund Scheme launched by HDFC Mutual Fund. This scheme was made available to investors on 10 Dec 1999. Arun Agarwal is the Current Fund Manager of HDFC Silver ETF FoF Direct Growth fund. The fund currently has an Asset Under Management(AUM) of ₹9,37,048 Cr and the Latest NAV as of 04 Jun 2026 is ₹42.61.
The HDFC Silver ETF FoF Direct Growth is rated Very High risk. Minimum SIP Investment is set to ₹100. Minimum Lumpsum Investment is ₹100. Exit load of 1%, if redeemed within 15 days.
